name: Naive Boy Super Lash
short_description: Do you like whips? Have you ever wanted an accurate, next-generation, stimulating whip simulator? Well, this game is far from it, but at least it tries!
detailed_description:
Do you like whips? Have you ever wanted an accurate, next-generation, stimulating whip simulator? Well, this game is far from it, but at least it tries! This is a top-down game where you move a whip around with 2D physics.

Take control of Jim-Jack Rousseau’s trusty whip and progress through 11 levels in this small adventure. Beat some people up, beat some animals up, and even beat up your bad thoughts with some whip force. Follow your dreams of becoming the hero you always wanted to be… or not…

And maybe by the end of this, you’ll learn the absolute meaning of the state of nature*
(*note: it says “maybe”)
